name_en: Premium quality, B's latest tote bag, crafted from selected Italian tanned contrast stitching leather. Adorned with a glossy Thomas Burberry exclusive logo design, paired with a leather-covered mirror charm.
name_cn:
Premium quality, B's latest tote bag, crafted from selected Italian tanned contrast stitching leather. Adorned with a glossy Thomas Burberry exclusive logo design, paired with a leather-covered mirror charm.
34 x 14 x 28cm
Outer: 100% calf leather
Lining: 55% cotton, 45% linen🌟
